# MotorVault

## About
MotorVault is a marketplace for automotive parts and accessories.

## Important URLs
/
/products
/categories
/contact
/shipping
/returns
/about
/help

## AI Crawling Policy

Allowed:
- Product pages
- Category pages
- Public support pages

Disallowed:
- Checkout
- Dashboards
- Account pages
- Admin pages
- Order history
